title: InstitutionRankingHistoryEntry Collection
description: Array of InstitutionRankingHistoryEntry records. Each element: Dated snapshot of all institution rankings, enabling rank-over-time analysis.

InstitutionRankingSnapshot.description: A single institution's ranking at a point in time.

rank.description: Ranking position at this snapshot date (with ties).
rank.title: Rank

score.description: Combined score at this snapshot: artifact_score + citation_score + ae_score.
score.title: Score

as.description: Artifact score at this snapshot. Abbreviated 'as' in JSON output.
as.title: As

tp.description: Total papers at tracked conferences by authors at this institution.
tp.title: Tp

ta.description: Total artifacts produced by authors at this institution.
ta.title: Ta

rr.description: Reproducibility rate: percentage of artifacts with 'reproduced' badge.
rr.title: Rr

r.description: Number of unique researchers (authors) affiliated with this institution.
r.title: R

InstitutionRankingSnapshot.title: InstitutionRankingSnapshot

InstitutionRankingHistoryEntry.description: Dated snapshot of all institution rankings, enabling rank-over-time analysis.

entries.description: Normalized institution name → ranking snapshot. Keys are institution names.
entries.title: Entries

InstitutionRankingHistoryEntry.title: InstitutionRankingHistoryEntry
